name: Indus Valley Partners
category: Buy-side investment management technology & managed services (fintech)
description: Technology products, managed services, and consulting for alternative asset managers, spanning front-to-back data, risk, portfolio, and regulatory reporting workflows.
value_prop: Helps sophisticated asset managers improve efficiency, insight, and performance through data platforms, risk tools, data-quality automation, and workflow digitization.
target_customers: Alternative asset managers: hedge funds, private equity, private credit and CLO managers, family offices, infrastructure and real estate funds
differentiators: 25+ years focused exclusively on the buy-side
Combines software products + managed services + consulting
Industry platforms: IVP for Private Funds, IVP for Credit, IVP for Master Data Management
Serves large, complex managers (Blue Owl, Bain Capital, Hudson Bay, Sands Capital)
geography: Global; HQ New York, delivery across multiple time zones
